name: Lamphun east retail and market expansion
notes: East/southeast Lamphun urban expansion around Jampha Shopping Mall, Chatuchak market, and Route 106 frontage where destination charging should carry more weight than the current model gives.

name: Lamphun Route 11-106 connector fringe
notes: Connector demand between the Chiang Mai-Lamphun Route 11 corridor and the Lamphun urban retail spine; useful for fast-charge siting near bypass and commuter flow.
